mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.tomb_id, t.name AS tomb_name, m.visitor_name, m.avatar, m.content, m.status, m.create_time FROM tomb_message m LEFT JOIN tomb t ON m.tomb_id = t.id AND t.del_flag = 0 WHERE m.del_flag = 0 AND m.status = 'approved' ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tomb_message m INNER JOIN tomb t ON m.tomb_id = t.id AND t.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN family fam ON t.family_id = fam.id AND fam.del_flag = 0
AND ((t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) FROM family f WHERE f.id = t.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) )) OR (t.family_id IS NULL AND (t.user_id = #{currentUserId} OR t.create_by = #{currentUserId})))
AND m.del_flag = 0

SELECT m.id, m.tomb_id, t.name AS tomb_name, m.visitor_name, m.avatar, m.content, m.status, m.create_time FROM tomb_message m INNER JOIN tomb t ON m.tomb_id = t.id AND t.del_flag = 0
AND ((t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) FROM family f WHERE f.id = t.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) )) OR (t.family_id IS NULL AND (t.user_id = #{currentUserId} OR t.create_by = #{currentUserId})))
AND m.del_flag = 0 AND m.status = 'approved'
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
